_comment: Instrument universe for the AI trading bot. Verify IG epic IDs in your account before enabling instruments.
_epic_format: IG CFD epics. Find yours via: broker.search_market('FTSE') or IG platform. TODAY.IP = daily rolling, MONTH1.IP = front month.

instruments.name: Gold (Spot)
instruments.notes: Core instrument. Most liquid during London open and NY overlap. Heavily affected by USD news.

instruments.name: FTSE 100
instruments.notes: UK equities index. Active 08:00–16:30 UTC. Sensitive to BOE decisions and UK macro data.

instruments.name: S&P 500
instruments.notes: US large-cap index. Highest volume 13:30–16:00 UTC. Reacts strongly to NFP, CPI, FOMC.

instruments.name: NASDAQ 100
instruments.notes: Tech-heavy index. Higher beta than S&P. Avoid earnings season gaps.

instruments.name: DAX 40
instruments.notes: German equities index. Sensitive to ECB decisions and EU macro. Gaps on Monday open.

instruments.name: EUR/USD
instruments.notes: Most liquid forex pair. Sensitive to ECB and Fed divergence. Low spread.

instruments.name: GBP/USD
instruments.notes: Volatile during UK data releases. Avoid around BOE decisions without wide stops.

instruments.name: USD/JPY
instruments.notes: Primary Asian session pair. BOJ intervention risk. Trending market — suits trend strategies.

instruments.name: AUD/USD
instruments.notes: Australian dollar. Active during Asian session. Sensitive to China data and commodity prices.

instruments.name: NZD/USD
instruments.notes: Thinner liquidity than AUD. Enable if Asian session performance warrants.

instruments.name: Brent Crude Oil
instruments.notes: European crude benchmark. Sensitive to OPEC decisions and geopolitical events. Wide intraday swings.

instruments.name: WTI Crude Oil
instruments.notes: US crude benchmark. EIA inventory Wednesday 15:30 UTC causes sharp moves. Enable cautiously.

instruments.name: Nikkei 225
instruments.notes: Japanese equity index. Correlated with USD/JPY. Enable once Asian session strategy is validated.
